Plugin.Name: ThemeUI
Plugin.Author: onyxdigital-dev
Plugin.Overview: Theme switcher plugin for Unraid 7.2+. Apply beautiful dark color themes across the entire Unraid web UI - dashboard, login page, Docker and VM pages, usage bars, pie charts, tables, buttons, and context menus. Themes apply instantly on save with no reboot required. Includes 10 built-in themes: Catppuccin Mocha, Nord, Dracula, Gruvbox Dark, Tokyo Night, Solarized Dark, One Dark, Rose Pine, Everforest, and Black and White.
Plugin.Description: Theme switcher for Unraid 7.2+ with 10 built-in dark themes and a custom CSS override textarea for fine-tuning.
